mapper.select: SELECT table_session_id ,table_no ,customer_cnt ,start_time ,end_time ,create_user ,create_time ,update_user ,update_time FROM #schema#.t_table_session_info where table_no = #{tableNo} and end_time is null order by update_time desc limit 1

select ttsi.table_session_id ,mt.table_no ,mt.floor ,mt.type ,mt.capacity ,coalesce(ttsi.customer_cnt, 0) as customer_cnt ,ttsi.start_time from #schema#.m_table mt left join #schema#.t_table_session_info ttsi on mt.table_no = ttsi.table_no and ttsi.end_time is null order by mt.floor, mt.table_no
mapper.update: update #schema#.t_table_session_info set end_time = now() where table_no = #{tableNo}
